title: Class Inheritance
description: Inherit properties and behaviors from a base class to create specialized subclasses.
problemStatement:
Super and Sub! Define a base class `Vehicle` with a method `makeNoise()`. Then, create a subclass `Train` that overrides `makeNoise()` to print `"Choo Choo!"`.

**Requirement:** Use the `override` keyword in the subclass.
hints: Classes support inheritance, while structs do not.
